# Chapter 9: Circuits: KVL, KCL, impedance  (~110 pp)
- 9.1 Lumped-parameter circuits (10) · 9.2 KVL and KCL (10) · 9.3 Resistive networks: Thevenin, Norton, superposition (15) · 9.4 Capacitors and inductors (15) · 9.5 Transient response: RC, RL, RLC (18) · 9.6 AC steady-state and impedance (18) · 9.7 Power: real, reactive, apparent (12) · 9.8 Three-phase introduction (12)

**Archetype**: balance, transport, control. **Project**: build and characterise a simple bandpass filter. **Exercises**: 45.
